auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to the PIM admin panel
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

topbar.agent_mock_tooltip: MOCK · Agent layer requires implementation (epic 0.7, Phase 2)
topbar.audit_log_tooltip: MOCK · Audit log requires BE endpoint

hero.title: Ask the agent or search the catalog
hero.subtitle: The dashboard shows PIM traffic, integration status and agent suggestions. Every block is a mock; backend wiring lands in later tickets.

completeness.title: Completeness
completeness.subtitle: overall and per channel — publish readiness

attributes.list_subtitle: Schema definitions reused across catalog objects.
attributes.empty: No attributes for the current tenant.
attributes.write_deferred_note: Manual create / edit / drag-and-drop is deferred to the schema-add agent flow (Faza 2). The seeder ships the MVP attribute set.

attribute_groups.list_subtitle: Logical grouping for attribute layout in forms.
attribute_groups.empty: No attribute groups for the current tenant.
attribute_groups.write_deferred_note: Manual create / edit is deferred to the schema-add agent flow (Faza 2).

assets.list_subtitle: Digital assets — images, video, documents — referenced from products and categories.
assets.write_deferred_note: Drag-and-drop upload, edit metadata dialog, preview modal, and bulk delete land in a follow-up — read-only grid + show ships now.

channels.list_subtitle: Publication targets — locales, currencies, and attribute mapping per kind.
channels.empty: No channels for the current tenant.
channels.write_deferred_note: Manual create / edit + ChannelObjectTypeMapping authoring (per-kind attribute mapping) is deferred to a follow-up — read-only surface ships in this PR. The integration adapters (#74 BaseLinker, #81 Shopify) consume this resource directly.

placeholder.mapping: Per-kind ChannelObjectTypeMapping editor lands in a follow-up — required before #74/#81 integration sync flips on.
placeholder.preview: Per-channel product preview lands in 0.10.6 (API Configurator).

categories.list_subtitle: Hierarchical taxonomy backed by Postgres ltree.
categories.empty: No categories for the current tenant.
categories.no_attributes: This category has no attribute values yet.
categories.write_deferred_note: Drag-and-drop reparenting + create/edit forms are deferred to a follow-up ticket — the read-only tree ships in this PR.

object_types.list_subtitle: Schema carriers for catalog kinds (ADR-009). Custom kinds unblock in Faza 2.
object_types.custom_disabled_explanation: Custom ObjectTypes (kind=custom) are stored in the database from day one but disabled by feature flag in MVP. The schema-add agent in Faza 2 will mint and configure them through natural-language requests.
object_types.custom_empty: No custom ObjectTypes yet — create your first one above.
object_types.custom_present_note: {{count}} custom ObjectType(s) exist in this tenant; visible after Faza 2 unlock.

create_custom.title: Create custom ObjectType
create_custom.subtitle: Custom kinds (e.g. service, kit, bundle) ship with no built-in business logic — only the schema. Attach AttributeGroups and start adding rows from the modeling UI.
create_custom.code_hint: Lowercase letters, digits, underscore. Must be unique per tenant.
create_custom.validation: Code and at least one label entry are required.

object_types.empty: No object types for the current tenant.
object_types.write_deferred_note: Editing built-in ObjectTypes (label / labelAttribute / imageAttribute / completenessRules) is deferred to the schema-add agent flow (Faza 2).

coming_soon.body: This view is part of epic {{epic}}. It is not implemented yet — track progress on GitHub Issues.

products.list_subtitle: Catalogue of products scoped to the current tenant.
products.empty: No products yet. Create one to get started.

show.no_attributes: This object has no attribute values yet.

products.no_object_type: No built-in product ObjectType is available. Run the catalog seeder.

validation.sku_max: SKU can be at most 64 characters.
validation.name_max: Name can be at most 255 characters.

api_profiles.list_subtitle: Per-integrator presets — visible ObjectTypes, attributes, filters, webhooks.
api_profiles.create_subtitle: Basic info — attributes / filters / webhook configuration land in #92 / #93.
api_profiles.empty: No profiles yet. Create one to expose a curated API surface to an integrator.

form.object_types_help: Built-in product / category / asset types — pick which classes of objects this profile exposes.
form.attributes_help: Pick attribute codes the API will project. Anything not on this list is stripped from the response.
form.filters_help: Server-side filters applied on every request through this profile. Empty = no filter.
form.preview_help: Local preview of the response shape with selected attributes. Live preview against a real product lands in #95 (`/api/profiles/{code}/test`).
form.preview_live_note: Sample values are mocked per attribute type. Hit the test endpoint for real data.
form.webhook_help: Outbound webhooks fire HMAC-signed POSTs to the URL on each subscribed event. The signature lands in `X-Pim-Signature: sha256=<hex>`.
form.webhook_url_help: Leave empty to disable outbound webhooks. URL must accept POST with JSON body.
form.webhook_secret_note: The secret is stored server-side and shown only on rotation. Use "Regenerate secret" on the profile page.
form.webhook_events_help: Pick events that trigger a delivery. Catalog events from #47 — listing per ObjectKind.

fields.code_help: Lowercase letters, digits, dashes or underscores. Cannot be changed after creation.
fields.name: Name
fields.rate_limit_help: Requests per hour granted to keys scoped to this profile.

show.no_keys: No keys reference this profile yet. Generate one via pim:apikey:generate CLI.
show.keys_management_note: Full key management UI (generate / revoke / rotate) lands in a follow-up.
show.no_webhook_url: No webhook configured. Set a URL in the Webhook tab to enable HMAC-signed delivery.
show.webhook_test_failed: Delivery failed — check the URL is reachable.
show.webhook_secret_warning: Capture this now — old subscribers must update. Closing this view discards it.
show.webhook_history_note: Delivery history + retry log lands in a follow-up (Faza 1 monitoring).

validation.code_format: Code must be lowercase letters, digits, dashes or underscores.
validation.rate_limit_range: Rate limit must be between 1 and 100000.

errors.create_failed: Could not create the profile. Check the code is unique within the tenant.

modeling.title: Modeling
modeling.description: Define ObjectTypes, Attributes, Attribute Groups and Categories used across the catalog.

built_in_lock.label: Locked
built_in_lock.tooltip: System type — protected from edits or deletion.

attributes.system_immutable_note: System attribute — code, type, and validation are immutable.

migration.title: Migrate type — {{name}}
migration.description: Change the data type of this attribute. Current type: {{from}}. Existing values will be re-shaped per the mapping plan; the original payload is snapshotted into attribute_migration_backups before any update.
migration.mapping_empty: Click "Suggest mappings" to inspect existing values.
migration.force: Force destructive migration (e.g. multiselect → select picks first).
migration.blocked: This migration path is not supported in MVP.
migration.force_required: This migration is destructive. Tick Force to confirm.
migration.error_generic: Could not run migration. Check your input or retry.

attribute_groups.members_empty: No attributes attached. Use the API to attach attributes (UI follow-up).
attribute_groups.attach_deferred_note: Attach / detach UI lands in a follow-up — wire the AttachAttributeToGroup command first. visible_when + reorder are live now (UI-08.8).

inheritance_preview.title: Effective attribute groups preview
inheritance_preview.description: What an object of the chosen kind would see if placed under this category.
inheritance_preview.empty: No effective groups for this combination.
